justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists private work order types to verify the user's Itcons.app credentials and does not modify data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the authenticated user's private Itcons.app workspace and does not affect public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only fetches private work report model records and returns them without modifying state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the user's private Itcons.app workspace and does not touch public internet surfaces.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or revoke anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves private work reports by query parameters and does not create or update reports.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the authenticated user's private Itcons.app workspace and does not affect public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove data or perform irreversible changes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only fetches private work reports and filters them by date without modifying stored records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads closed Itcons.app data and does not publish or send information to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes today's date and retrieves matching private work reports without modifying any data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the user's private Itcons.app workspace and does not touch public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform any irreversible operation.
